empty.titleLiked: You currently have no liked ingredients
empty.titleDisliked: You currently have no disliked ingredients
empty.titleFlagged: You currently have no flagged ingredients
empty.descriptionLiked: To make your meal planning easier, rate some of your favourite ingredients on the dashboard. When you use the Insight Scanner, we'll spotlight them and suggest tasty recipes you'll love!
empty.descriptionDisliked: Rate ingredients on the dashboard to build your disliked list. We'll make sure to flag them whenever they appear in a product.
empty.descriptionFlagged: Flag ingredients from the dashboard or scan results to highlight them in red whenever they appear in a product.

error.title: Could not load ingredients
error.migrationRequired: Database migration required. Please run the ALTER TABLE statements in your Supabase SQL Editor to add the ingredient preference columns.

upsell.tagline:
Flag ingredients to highlight
them in red on every scan
